description:
Project Context: Developing a cloud\\-native Drools Rules Engine to migrate legacy workflows and manage real\\-time case tracking.
 



**Core Responsibilities:** 




 Develop and optimize a Spring Boot 3\\.x / Java 21 (or Java 26 experimental) application serving as a wrapper for the Apache Drools KIE runtime.
 



 Design and maintain OpenAPI (Swagger) specs for a unified REST API supporting Batch, Paginated, and Filtered execution modes.
 



 Design NoSQL data models in Google Cloud Firestore to store dynamic rule configurations and workflow state.
 



 Implement Cloud Run Tasks and Jobs to handle asynchronous, long\\-running batch execution of SLA rules across millions of historical records.
 



 Stream execution logs and rule\\-firing metrics into BigQuery for real\\-time business intelligence and "Like\\-for\\-Like" parity auditing.
 



 Build robust data access layers using Hibernate/JPA to interface with Cloud SQL (PostgreSQL).
 



 Implement StatelessKieSessions for high\\-concurrency, horizontal scaling on GCP Cloud Run.
 



**Technical Stack:** 
 Java 21\\+, Apache Drools, Spring Boot, Hibernate/JPA, OpenAPI, GCP Cloud Run, Cloud SQL (PostgreSQL).

Our team is innovating new technologies for managing Edge Devices from Azure in a safe, secure, sovereign, reliable, and scalable model for our global customers across various Azure Geographies. We pride ourselves in developing technologies that enhance customer experience and enable using edge computing to address customer workload needs and managing edge devices in Azure. We build ecosystems that bring intelligence to locations where customers are running their business. We enable real\\-time decision\\-making, ultra\\-low\\-latency experiences, and trustworthy AI systems that operate securely at the edge and in the cloud. If you’re passionate about AI\\-driven engineering — from intent understanding and data\\-driven insights to autonomous orchestration and predictive edge intelligence — this is where your work will have global impact.
   

  

 As part of this role in the Microsoft Specialized Cloud team, you operate as a senior technical leader shaping the data \\& analytics foundations that power this org’s products and platforms at a global scale. The engineer will collaborate with Product, Engineering, and Data Science stakeholders from multiple teams to analyse data requirements, understand the data flow across existing and new products, differentiate human vs. AI Agent generated data, lead the design of data models, run the product with an AI first mindset. You will be responsible for identifying data sources, building code to extract raw data, and transforming it into formats compatible with downstream consumers. You will develop tools, do performance monitoring, and perform root cause analysis of issues to ensure robust and reliable data pipelines.  You will define architectural direction, influence multi\\-team roadmaps, and set data engineering standards that enable reliable, secure, and scalable analytics for AI\\-driven products. To accelerate our Copilot and agent\\-driven initiatives across Edge  you will have to own the technical vision, system design, and implementation strategy for next\\-generation AI copilots.

Please apply today and let's build the future together! The team is supportive of flexible work, and you may work from home up to 50% of the time.

* Collaborate with product managers, software engineers, and researchers to translate product vision into production\\-ready AI capabilities and measurable outcomes.
* Ensure reliability, observability, and governance of AI systems, including monitoring model performance, data quality, and responsible AI practices.
* Build reusable platforms, APIs, and tools that enable teams to rapidly develop AI\\-powered features and self\\-service intelligent applications.


**Qualifications**
* 10–12\\+ years of experience in software engineering, with significant experience building scalable backend or distributed systems. Strong programming expertise in one or more languages such as Python, Go, Java, or C\\#, with experience designing production\\-grade services and APIs.
* Experience building AI\\-powered applications, including integrating LLMs, implementing agent or Copilot workflows, and orchestrating multi\\-step AI interactions.

* Familiarity with retrieval\\-augmented generation (RAG) architectures, vector databases, embeddings, and semantic search systems.

**Description**
 Worldwide Grocery Stores, Graise Hawkeye team is seeking a Quality Assurance Engineer. The Graise Hawkeye team is responsible for ensuring the Point of Sale (POS), SCO system is robust, reliable, and production ready. The team focuses on functional, integration, and non\\-functional testing (NFT), including performance and resilience assessments, to validate the system's quality. Comprising skilled Quality Assurance (QA) professionals and Software Development Engineer\\-Test (SDETs), the team works collaboratively to anticipate and address complex engineering and business challenges. Their responsibilities include test planning, automation, bug tracking, regression testing, and collaborating with cross\\-functional teams to ensure seamless delivery. By maintaining high testing standards and continuously improving processes, the team plays a vital role in delivering a performant and resilient POS system to meet business and customer needs.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Assist in the development and automation of functional, integration, and performance tests for an enterprise\\-class, multi\\-concept, 3\\-tier POS system.
* Contribute to maintaining and supporting test frameworks that help both QA and Dev teams in their testing efforts, ensuring smooth integration across various environments.
* Collaborate with team members on test automation strategies to improve functional, integration, and performance test coverage.
* Help automate the collection, analysis, and reporting of test results, ensuring transparency and providing useful insights to stakeholders.
* Use research and analytical skills to validate test results and help optimize testing processes for better performance and broader coverage.
* Assist in designing and implementing test scenarios and cases to replicate real\\-world conditions, ensuring comprehensive testing across QA and performance testing environments.
* Work with engineering and application teams to identify and resolve issues, fostering collaboration between QA and development teams to help improve overall product quality.
* Open to leveraging AI to enhance daily tasks, job efficiency, and test delivery. Embrace an AI\\-first approach to optimize workflows and drive faster, more accurate results.


 A day in the life
   

  

 The Graise Hawkeye Team engages in a variety of activities daily to ensure the quality, performance, and resilience of the Point of Sale (POS) system. The team focus on creating detailed test plans, developing both manual and automated test cases, and performing comprehensive functional, integration, and non\\-functional testing, including performance and scalability assessments. Collaboration with cross\\-functional teams is a cornerstone of their work, enabling them to troubleshoot issues effectively and ensure alignment on deliverables. They also manage test environments, track and resolve defects, and conduct regression testing to maintain the integrity of existing features. By analyzing test results, providing insights, and continuously improving processes, the team ensures the POS system is production\\-ready and aligned with business goals.
   

  

**About The Team**
 The Graise Hawkeye Team is dedicated to ensuring the reliability, performance, and readiness of the Point of Sale (POS) system. Our mission is to validate that every component of the POS system meets the highest standards of functionality, resilience, and production readiness.
   

  

 At the core of our team's approach is an AI\\-first narrative, where we leverage AI\\-driven tools and automation to enhance testing efficiency and accuracy. We utilize advanced AI models to optimize functional and integration testing, as well as non\\-functional testing (NFT), enabling us to proactively identify and address complex engineering and business challenges before they affect end users.
   

  

 Our team is made up of skilled Quality Assurance (QA) professionals and Software Development Engineers in Test (SDETs) who work together to simulate real\\-world scenarios, develop AI\\-powered automated test frameworks, and ensure seamless functionality across the POS ecosystem. By integrating AI into our testing processes, we not only speed up test execution but also improve test coverage and the detection of subtle issues that may have otherwise gone unnoticed.
   

  

 With a commitment to leveraging AI\\-driven insights and advanced testing methodologies, we serve as a critical partner in delivering robust, efficient, and high\\-quality POS solutions that meet the ever\\-evolving needs of the business and its users.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**

**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience in API \\& Mobile testing

title: Senior QA
description:
****About WPP Media****
 WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. With exceptional talent, trusted data and intelligence, and world\\-class partnerships – all united by our pioneering agentic marketing platform, WPP Open – we help clients navigate change, capture opportunity, and deliver transformational growth.
   

  

 WPP Media is WPP's AI\\-driven media operating unit, bringing together media, data, and partnerships to deliver creative personalisation at scale. Connected through WPP Open and powered by Open Intelligence, clients see exactly where, how, and why their media investment is working.
   

  

 For more information, visit wppmedia.com.
   

  

****About WPP Media****
 WPP is the creative transformation company. We use the power of creativity to build better futures for our people, planet, clients and communities. For more information, visit wpp.com.
   

  

 WPP Media is WPP’s global media collective. In a world where media is everywhere and in everything, we bring the best platform, people, and partners together to create limitless opportunities for growth. For more information, visit wppmedia.com
   

  

 At WPP Media, We Believe In The Power Of Our Culture And Our People. It’s What Elevates Us To Deliver Exceptional Experiences For Both Our Clients And Each Other. In This Role It Will Be Critical To Embrace WPP \\& WPP Media’s Shared Core Values:
   

  

* Be Extraordinary by Leading Collectively to Inspire transformational Creativity.
* Create an Open environment by Balancing People and Client Experiences by Cultivating Trust.
* Lead Optimistically by Championing Growth and Development to Mobilize the Enterprise.


****WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR****
**Job Title:** 
 QA Lead
   

  

****Summary:****
 We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced
 **Senior QA Engineer** 
 to champion the quality and integrity of our next\\-generation media data lake on Microsoft Azure. You will be a hands\\-on team leader, responsible for designing and implementing a comprehensive data quality strategy from ingestion to consumption. You will ensure that the delivery of high\\-quality, reliable, and scalable solutions.
   

  

****Responsibilities:****
* Data Quality Strategy \\& Planning: Develop and implement comprehensive QA strategies, test plans, and test cases specifically for data pipelines, data models, and data warehousing solutions on Azure.
* Azure Data Platform Expertise: Leverage your deep understanding of the Azure data ecosystem (Azure Data Factory, Azure Databricks, Synapse Analytics, Azure Data Lake Storage) to design and execute effective data validation and testing strategies across the Medallion Architecture (Bronze, Silver, and Gold layers).
* Test Automation for Data: Drive the development and maintenance of automated testing frameworks for data. This includes writing SQL\\-based validation rules, Python/PySpark scripts for data profiling, and leveraging frameworks like Great Expectations or dbt test to ensure data quality at scale.
* Test Execution \\& Analysis: Oversee and execute testing of ETL/ELT pipelines. Analyze results to identify data quality issues, data integrity failures, and transformation logic errors. Document and track data defects to resolution.
* Collaboration: Work closely with Data Engineers, Data Architects, and Product Managers to embed a "quality\\-first" mindset throughout the data development lifecycle.
* Performance \\& Scale Testing: Design and execute tests to validate the performance and scalability of data pipelines. Ensure they meet SLAs for data volume, processing time, and query performance.
* Data Governance \\& Security Testing: Partner with the architecture team to implement and test data governance policies. Validate the implementation of security controls, including access controls (RBAC), data masking, and PII handling.
* Continuous Improvement: Champion and implement robust data quality assurance processes and master data management principles. Identify opportunities to improve data quality frameworks and enhance efficiency.
* Reporting: Provide regular reports on data quality metrics, pipeline success rates, defect leakage, and overall data platform health.


****Qualifications:****
* Experience: 5\\+ years of experience in quality assurance, with at least 2\\+ years in a lead or senior role within a data\\-centric environment (Data Engineering, Data Warehousing, Business Intelligence).
* Azure Expertise: Proven, hands\\-on experience testing data platforms and pipelines on Microsoft Azure. Deep understanding of services like Azure Data Factory, Spark , Synapse, and ADLS Gen2\\.
* Technical Skills:
+ Expert\\-level proficiency in SQL for complex data querying, profiling, and validation.
+ Strong proficiency in Scala for writing data quality tests and automation scripts.
+ Deep understanding of data warehousing concepts, ETL/ELT processes, and data modeling (star schema, dimensional modeling).
+ Experience with CI/CD pipelines for data (e.g., Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions).

* Leadership Skills: Excellent leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills. Ability to mentor engineers on testing best practices.
* Problem\\-Solving: Strong analytical and problem\\-solving skills with the ability to triage and diagnose complex data integrity issues.
* Education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related field.


****Bonus Points:****
* Azure certifications (e.g., Azure DevOps Engineer Expert, Azure Solutions Architect Expert).
* Practical experience testing within a Medallion data lake architecture.
* Experience with security testing tools (e.g., OWASP ZAP, Burp Suite).
* Experience with Agile development methodologies.


****Life At WPP Media \\& Benefits****
 Our passion for shaping the next era of media includes investing in our employees to help them do their best work, and we’re just as committed to employee growth as we are to responsible media investment. WPP Media employees can tap into the global WPP Media \\& WPP networks to pursue their passions, grow their networks, and learn at the cutting edge of marketing and advertising. We have a variety of employee resource groups and host frequent in\\-office events showcasing team wins, sharing thought leadership, and celebrating holidays and milestone events. Our benefits include competitive medical, group retirement plans, vision, and dental insurance, significant paid time off, preferential partner discounts, and employee mental health awareness days.
   

  

 WPP Media is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.
   

  

 We believe the best work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach, with teams in the office around four days a week. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.
   

  

 Please read our Privacy Notice for more information on how we process the information you provide.

title: Camunda Developer - VOIS

 Proficient in Java development with strong understanding of design patterns relevant to microservices.
   

  

 Knowledgeable in event‑driven design and messaging platforms, ideally Kafka.

 Demonstrates strong analytical capabilities, effective communication skills, and a collaborative approach to problem‑solving.
   

  

**Not a perfect fit?**

If you are excited about this role but your experience does not align exactly with every aspect of the job description, you are encouraged to apply. You may be the right candidate for this or another opportunity, and the recruitment team will support you in exploring where your skills fit best.
   

  

**What's In It For You**
 Opportunity to work on a strategic greenfield project with high organisational visibility.
   

  

 Exposure to modern automation technologies and enterprise‑scale architectural decision‑making.
   

  

 Opportunities to mentor others, shape best practices, and influence technical direction.
   

  

 A collaborative environment that values innovation and continuous improvement.
   

  

**What Skills You Will Learn**
 Advanced expertise in Camunda, BPMN, and large‑scale process‑automation frameworks.
   

  

 Deeper proficiency in microservices, event‑driven architecture, and enterprise integration patterns.
   

  

 Capability‑building in technical leadership, design advisory, and architectural decision‑making.
   

  

 Enhanced collaboration, coaching, and cross‑functional project delivery skills.
   

  

**VOIS Equal Opportunity Employer Commitment**
 Vodafone recognises and celebrates the value of diversity in building a workforce that reflects the customers and communities it serves. No form of discrimination is tolerated.
